en.extract:
The Madagascar mannikin (Lepidopygia nana) is a common species of estrildid finch native to Madagascar. It has an estimated global extent of occurrence of 100,000 to 1,000,000 km2. Other names for this species include Madagascar munia, bibfinch, African bibfinch, African parsonfinch, and dwarf mannikin.
It is found in subtropical and tropical dry forest, grassland, shrubland and even artificial landscapes. The status of the species is evaluated as Least Concern.


References

BirdLife Species Factsheet

''Lonchura nana'' }} The '''Madagascar mannikin''' ('''''Lepidopygia nana''''') is a common [[species]] of [[estrildid finch]] native to [[Madagascar]]. It has an estimated global extent of occurrence of 100,000 to 1,000,000 km2. Other names for this species include '''Madagascar munia''', '''bibfinch''', '''African bibfinch''', '''African parsonfinch''', and '''dwarf mannikin'''. It is found in [[subtropical]] and [[tropical]] dry forest, [[grassland]], shrubland and even artificial landscapes. The status of the species is evaluated as [[Least Concern]]. ==References== {{Reflist}} *[http://www.birdlife.org/datazone/species/index.html?action=SpcHTMDetails.asp&sid=8696&m=0 BirdLife Species Factsheet] {{Passeroidea|P.|state=collapsed}} {{Taxonbar|from=Q27075728}} [[Category:Estrildidae]] [[Category:Endemic birds of Madagascar]] [[Category:Birds described in 1845]] [[Category:Taxa named by Jacques Pucheran]] {{Estrildidae-stub}}

zh.extract:
马岛文鸟（學名：Lepidopygia nana，台湾作馬達加斯加文鳥），是梅花雀科文鸟属的一种鳥類，为马达加斯加的特有种。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
马岛文鸟為植食性，體重約8.2公克，鳥喙寬平均5.1公釐、深平均6.3公釐、嘴峰長平均约9.2公釐；翼長平均約44.9公分；跗蹠約12.2公釐；尾長37.2公分。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的（低地）干燥疏灌丛、牧草地、亚热带或热带的湿润低地林、亚热带或热带的旱林、耕地、湿地、干燥的稀树草原、亚热带或热带的（低地）干草原和乡村花园。
